0.text: Patchy reticulonodular fibrotic density increases in the apices of both lungs

1.text: Mild bronchiectatic changes in both lungs

3.text: Subcentimeter calcific nodule in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific solid nodules in the mediobasal subsegment and posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Nonspecific nodules in the left upper lobe
